command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
export PATH="$PATH:/home/jose/.local/bin"

# Run the test with a MANUAL trace - patch the executor to log subprocess start
python3 -c "
import sys, os, json, time, tempfile, subprocess
sys.path.insert(0, '.')
from runtime.moreno_governed_executor import GovernedExecutor, DEFAULT_REPO

# Create a temp repo like the test does
import shutil
tmp = tempfile.mkdtemp(prefix='moreno-debug-')
repo = os.path.join(tmp, 'repo')
os.makedirs(repo)
subprocess.run(['git','init','-q','-b','main'], cwd=repo)
subprocess.run(['git','config','user.name','Test'], cwd=repo)
subprocess.run(['git','config','user.email','t@t.com'], cwd=repo)

# Create minimal structure
os.makedirs(os.path.join(repo, 'memory/phase-controller/jobs/phase-test-001'))
os.makedirs(os.path.join(repo, 'docs'))
open(os.path.join(repo, 'docs/spec.md'), 'w').write('# Spec\n')
import json as j
j.dump({'job_id':'phase-test-001','status':'queued','retry_count':0,'artifacts':[]}, 
       open(os.path.join(repo,'memory/phase-controller/jobs/phase-test-001/status.json'),'w'))
j.dump({'controller_id':'c','current_job_id':'phase-test-001','status':'running','enabled':True},
       open(os.path.join(repo,'memory/phase-controller/controller.json'),'w'))
subprocess.run(['git','add','.'], cwd=repo)
subprocess.run(['git','commit','-q','-m','fixture'], cwd=repo)

os.environ['MORENO_REPO_ROOT'] = repo
from runtime.moreno_governed_executor import GovernedExecutor, DEFAULT_REPO
import importlib, runtime.moreno_governed_executor as ex
importlib.reload(ex)
executor = ex.GovernedExecutor(ex.DEFAULT_REPO)
print('Executor repo:', executor.repo)

result = executor.start_governed_phase({
    'job_id': 'phase-test-001',
    'objective': 'test',
    'target_paths': ['runtime/generated.py'],
})
print('Result:', json.dumps({k:v for k,v in result.items() if k not in ('poll_request',)}, indent=2))

# Wait and check worker log
import time
time.sleep(5)
ws_path = os.path.join(repo, 'memory/execution-pipeline/governed/phase-test-001/_background', result['run_id'])
log = os.path.join(ws_path, 'worker.log')
if os.path.exists(log):
    print('WORKER LOG:')
    print(open(log).read()[:2000])
else:
    print('NO WORKER LOG')
    
state_path = os.path.join(ws_path, 'run-state.json')
if os.path.exists(state_path):
    print('STATE:', open(state_path).read())
else:
    print('NO STATE FILE')

shutil.rmtree(tmp)
" 2>&1
ENDSSH
